description_wiki: Daebu Island (Korean: 대부도; RR: Daebudo) is an island in the Yellow Sea, within the municipal borders of the city of Ansan, Gyeonggi Province, South Korea.
South Korea, officially the Republic of Korea (ROK), is a country in East Asia.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.

aliases: Saint Paul, Ramsey, Minnesota, United States
description: capital of the state of Minnesota, United States; county seat of Ramsey County, Minnesota

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

surface_forms: 50th year anniversary of the armistice of the Korean War
aliases: 국제련합군 총사령관을 일방으로 하고 조선인민군 최고사령관 및 중국인민지원군 사령원을 다른 일방으로 하는 한국 군사 정전에 관한 협정
description: armistice signed July 27, 1953 ending hostilities in Korean War
description_wiki: The Korean Armistice Agreement (Korean: 한국정전협정; Hanja: 韓國停戰協定) is an armistice that brought about a cessation of hostilities of the Korean War.
